previousText: Microsoft early career programs. Explore opportunities for students. Applications are not currently accepting applications. Check back for future cycles.
sampleCurrentText: Microsoft Explore applications are open for Summer 2027. First-year and sophomore students are eligible. Submit your application by October 15, 2026.

previousText: NASA internships include spring, summer, and fall sessions. Students can review eligibility and session dates.

previousText: CodePath career-ready courses are open by term. Application deadlines vary by course pathway.
